summary.intent: Drive PR #672 (ars-ui) to a clean merge by iteratively responding to Codex review threads, fixing stale menu focus-state bugs, and keeping CI green.
summary.outcome: All review threads resolved, four regression tests added for state-invalidation edges (blur cleanup, disabled-key revalidation, collection retyping, stale submenu clearing), highlight-update logic centralized, and the fix committed/pushed as 'fix(components): clear stale menu focus state'.

repo: Codex bot is triggered via '@codex review' in a PR comment and acknowledges with a 👀 reaction before posting threads; polling reaction counts is the reliable signal for bot activity.
CI matrix runs Formatting and Snapshot checks first, then Clippy and Workspace Check, then Unit Tests — useful for estimating when failures will surface.
Menu state invalidation must be centralized: highlight updates need to clear stale submenu state, and blur/sync/update paths each require their own revalidation hooks.
Collection retyping in ars-collections can leave a stale highlighted item that must be explicitly cleared.

code.finding: Highlight movement did not clear stale submenu state; centralizing all highlight updates through a single code path fixed four distinct invalidation bugs (closed blur, disabled-key highlight, collection retype, submenu clearing).

workflow: Polling with 'sleep N; gh api graphql ...' is effective for tracking both Codex review progress and CI status in a single command.
Running targeted cargo tests before committing (including ignored proptests) catches regressions early without waiting for full CI.
Running 'cargo +nightly fmt --all' followed by '--check' as a two-step ensures formatting is applied before verifying, preventing CI fmt failures.

friction: Codex review took significantly longer on the third trigger than earlier passes, requiring extended polling intervals (300s) and multiple write_stdin keep-alives.
Two new review threads appeared after a prior resolution pass, requiring an additional reply-and-resolve cycle before re-triggering Codex.
The initial test run failed on the stale-state paths as expected, but required a separate patch to fix the production code before tests could pass.
open_items: Proptest invariant 'menu_preserves_open_highlight_and_selection_invariants' was run with --ignored flag, suggesting it is excluded from normal CI and may need to be re-evaluated for inclusion.
PR #672 was pushed but the transcript ends before confirming a passing Codex review or merge — final Codex sign-off and merge still pending.
